# https://curl.haxx.se/rfc/cookie_spec.html
# This is a generated file! Do not edit.
#
# =============================================================================
# HOW TO GET FRESH COOKIES (do this when login fails):
# =============================================================================
# 1. Install the browser extension "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" (Chrome/Firefox)
# 2. Go to https://www.youtube.com and make sure you're signed in
#    (use a BURNER account, not your main Google account)
# 3. Click the extension -> Export cookies for this tab
# 4. Copy EVERYTHING it gives you and paste below, replacing ALL existing content
# 5. IMPORTANT: Make sure these cookies are present:
#    - VISITOR_DATA
#    - LOGIN_INFO
#    - SID, HSID, SSID, APISID, SAPISID
#    - __Secure-1PSID, __Secure-3PSID
#    - __Secure-1PSIDTS, __Secure-3PSIDTS
#
# =============================================================================
# REQUIRED FOR POT (Proof of Origin Token) - prevents bot checks:
# =============================================================================
# The youtube-plugin uses the VISITOR_DATA cookie to generate POT tokens.
# If you don't see VISITOR_DATA in your exported cookies, try:
#   - Clearing YouTube cookies and signing in again
#   - Using a different browser
#   - Visiting youtube.com while signed in, then exporting again
#
# Paste your real cookies below this line (replace everything below):
# =============================================================================
# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# https://curl.haxx.se/rfc/cookie_spec.html
# This is a generated file! Do not edit.
